content:
Given the undirected dynamic graph with the edges:
[(0, 1, 3), (0, 8, 5), (1, 7, 8), (1, 9, 8), (0, 6, 9), (5, 9, 10), (2, 7, 13), (2, 3, 16), (0, 5, 17), (4, 9, 17), (1, 8, 19), (5, 6, 19), (0, 3, 20), (2, 8, 21), (1, 5, 26), (7, 9, 27), (3, 4, 28)],

We need to find the nodes linked with node 7 exactly at time 27.

After scanning each edge, we have the following information:

* Edge (0, 1, 3) has node 0 and time 3. -> Add node 1.
* Edge (0, 8, 5) has node 0 and time 5. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (1, 7, 8) has node 1 and time 8. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (1, 9, 8) has node 1 and time 8. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (0, 6, 9) has node 0 and time 9. -> Add node 6.
* Edge (5, 9, 10) has node 5 and time 10. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (2, 7, 13) has node 2 and time 13. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (2, 3, 16) has node 2 and time 16. -> Add node 3.
* Edge (0, 5, 17) has node 0 and time 17. -> Add node 5.
* Edge (4, 9, 17) has node 4 and time 17. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (1, 8, 19) has node 1 and time 19. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (5, 6, 19) has node 5 and time 19. -> Add node 6.
* Edge (0, 3, 20) has node 0 and time 20. -> Add node 3.
* Edge (2, 8, 21) has node 2 and time 21. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (1, 5, 26) has node 1 and time 26. -> Add node 5.
* Edge (7, 9, 27) has node 7 and time 27. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (3, 4, 28) has node 3 and time 28. -> Add node 4.

The nodes matched are 7, 8, 9, and 6.

Answer: [7, 8, 9, 6]
